name: quarantine-manager
title: Quarantine Manager
description: Inspect extended attributes on macOS files and apps, check quarantine status, and remove the com.apple.quarantine flag from files you've verified as safe.
author: nurkamol

commands.name: remove-quarantine
commands.title: Remove Quarantine
commands.subtitle: Quarantine Manager
commands.description: View quarantine status and all extended attributes for a file or app. Remove the com.apple.quarantine flag after verifying the file's source.

commands.name: check-quarantine
commands.title: Check Quarantine Status
commands.subtitle: Quarantine Manager
commands.description: List all extended attributes on any file or app. Inspect raw and parsed values, including quarantine data, download source metadata, and more.
